sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n11521" key="a)paresto/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀπᾰρεστός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n11521.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">unpleasing,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Stob.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.7.11k</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
